items.summary: Dolomiti Energia Trento secure former NBA guard Charlie Brown Jr. for next season.
PAOK officially sign Cedi Osman on a three-year deal, completing his move from Panathinaikos.
La Laguna Tenerife sign guard TJ Bamba on a one-year contract.
Unicaja part ways with Polish center Aleksander Balcerowski after two seasons and three trophies.
Dante Maddox Jr. signs with Olimpia Milano but is immediately loaned to Derthona Tortona for the season.
Real Madrid captain Sergio Llull is reportedly renewing to play his 21st season with the club.
Napoli sign American playmaker Jeff Dowtin from Maccabi Tel Aviv after his first EuroLeague season.
Adin Vrabac returns to Bosna BH Telecom.
Hunter Dean is a new Perspektiva Ilirija player.
Ross Williams signs with Zadar for the 2026/27 season.
Zeeuw & Zeeuw Rotterdam City sign Finnish forward Elias Tumba.
House of Talents Spurs Kortrijk sign Symir Torrence.
VTB debutants Dinamo Vladivostok sign guard Malik Newman, who spent three seasons with Avtodor.
Oleg Akramov continues his career with Dinamo Vladivostok.
Viko Ioannina announce the acquisition of Ansley Almonor (23, 2.01m).
Viko Ioannina sign Greek guard Konstantinos Chantzis.
APU Old Wild West Udine sign former NBA guard Denzel Valentine.
Acqua S.Bernardo Cantu sign forward Savion Flagg.
Barcelona reportedly in advanced talks to sign Polish center Olek Balcerowski from Unicaja (per Diario SUR).
items._note: did not materialize; left Unicaja as FA

items.summary: Aris add veteran point guard Stefan Jovic to their roster.
Crvena zvezda Meridianbet officially sign 23-year-old forward Patrick Baldwin Jr.
Filou Oostende strengthen their squad with Stephan Swenson.
SC Derby sign Croatian international Antonio Jordano, arriving in Podgorica from Split.
Krka strengthen their backcourt by adding guard Đorđe Božić for next season.
Leon Williams joins Zeeuw & Zeeuw Rotterdam City.
House of Talents Spurs Kortrijk sign Dylan Arnett.
Galatasaray MCT Technic sign Montenegrin point guard Nikola Ivanovic.
Fenerbahce sign veteran forward and former Final Four MVP Will Clyburn.
Chris Duarte signs a two-year deal with Baskonia after parting ways with Unicaja.
Varese sign former NBA forward Isaiah Roby (27) after a season with ratiopharm Ulm; he has 190+ NBA appearances.
Dubai land French MVP Elie Okobo (28), signing the shooting guard to a multi-year deal.
Real Madrid sign Timothe Luwawu-Cabarrot in a blockbuster move, minutes after Baskonia released him.
San Pablo Burgos re-sign veteran captain Pablo Almazan as the club returns to the top flight.
Crvena zvezda Meridianbet sign American center Johnathan Motley on a multi-year deal.
Paris Basketball sign 26-year-old combo guard Tyson Etienne for 2026-27 (earlier Partizan links did not materialize).
Aris Betsson secure forward-center Jeremiah Robinson-Earl on a long-term contract as he completes his move to Europe.
Barcelona sign American guard Umoja Gibson from Cedevita Olimpija on a two-year deal after his breakout 2025-26 season.
Aris and Panathinaikos reach agreement on a EUR 1.2 million buyout, returning Greek guard Toliopoulos to Thessaloniki.
VTB League debutants Dinamo Vladivostok sign 23-year-old guard Jaylen Blackmon.
Dmitry Uzinsky returns to UNICS Kazan.
Evgeny Baburin signs with UNICS Kazan.
Zenit sign 31-year-old guard Ike Iroegbu, who has played in the G-League and Germany.
Veteran point guard Dmitry Khvostov signs with MBA Moscow.
UNICS Kazan sign 33-year-old forward Alexander Gudumak from MBA.
Parma sign 30-year-old American guard Jeremiah Martin on a 1+1 deal; he previously played for Enisey.
Buducnost VOLI strengthen with South Sudan international guard Marial Shayok.
Crvena zvezda Meridianbet bring in World Cup champion David Krämer.
Krka bolster their roster with the signing of Uroš Šikanić.
Jan Copot reinforces Perspektiva Ilirija.
Jaron Blossomgame joins Dubai Basketball through 2028 after leaving Monaco.
Partena Professional Okapi Aalst welcome Elias Lasisi.
Brussels Basketball sign Wesley Person Jr.
Zorg en Zekerheid Leiden sign Kjeld Zuidema.
Nick Davidson joins Okapi Aalst.
Besiktas sign forward Eugene Omoruyi.
Fenerbahce officially add guard Ignas Sargiunas, announced alongside Sertac Sanli.
Xavi Pascual activated his Barcelona release clause and is officially unveiled as Dubai Basketball head coach.
Fenerbahce bring back center Sertac Sanli on a one-year deal after a season at Besiktas.
Hapoel Tel Aviv announce the signing of Zach LeDay to a two-year contract after two seasons with Olimpia Milano.
Josh Nebo officially leaves Olimpia Milano for Barcelona after two seasons.
Panathinaikos extend their partnership with Juancho Hernangomez through 2030.
Two-time NBA champion Damian Jones is nearing a deal with Real Madrid per Eurohoops.
Ignas Brazdeikis joins Unicaja Malaga.
Reyer Venezia renew forward Kyle Wiltjer.
Lietkabelis sign guard Alexander Schumacher.
AS Monaco officially announce the departure of Jaron Blossomgame after four seasons.
Alexandre Libert moves to Okapi Aalst.
Jon Dolničar joins Krka in Novo mesto.
Lenart Sirc joins Krka in Novo mesto.
Uroš Plavšić signs with U-BT Cluj-Napoca.
Joel Armotrading is the new Igokea m:tel center.
Besiktas reach agreement with American guard Jaylen Nowell (27), a veteran of several NBA teams.
Maccabi Tel Aviv sign guard Yam Madar (1.90m, 25) to a lucrative three-year deal, switching Tel Aviv sides from Hapoel.
Barcelona sign Finnish power forward Olivier Nkamhoua (2.03m, 26) from Varese on a two-year deal after he averaged 16.0 points and 5.5 rebounds.
Hapoel Tel Aviv extend star center Dan Oturu.
Reyer Venezia sign young center Enoch Boakye.
La Laguna Tenerife add size with center Ethan Happ.
Fenerbahce officially announce the addition of Braxton Key from Valencia.
Anadolu Efes announce the signing of all-time EuroLeague leading scorer Mike James on a 1+1 contract, replacing Fenerbahce-bound Shane Larkin.
Besiktas sign former NBA guard DaQuan Jeffries.
Mario Saint-Supery returns to Spain, joining Valencia Basket.
Olimpia Milano extend the contract of Italian guard Stefano Tonut.
Borac Mozzart continue their roster build with Alex Steen (22, 206 cm).
Galatasaray confirm the signing of Chimezie Metu from Gran Canaria.
Anadolu Efes officially sign Angolan center Bruno Fernando (27) on a two-year deal, beating Maccabi to his signature.
Olimpia Milano near a deal with NBA sharpshooter Garrison Mathews (29, 38% career from three) per Eurohoops sources.
Olimpia Milano announce a multi-year contract extension with big man Ousmane Diop.
Barcelona announce Joel Parra contract extension until 2030.
Moses Wright, who had committed early to Barcelona, is reportedly on the exit door with a buyout that would land him at Olimpia Milano.
Aleksander Sekulic released by Dubai Basketball after finishing the season with the club.
Barcelona reportedly in talks with Aleksander Sekulic for the head coaching job, ahead of Galbiati and Sfairopoulos.
Virtus Bologna add former NBA forward Kessler Edwards to their frontcourt.
Spartak Office Shoes land experienced shooting guard Marko Jeremić (1991, 192 cm).
Zadar bring back club product Niko Šare on a long-term contract.
Mega Superbet sign 24-year-old Mihailo Bošković.
Olympiacos extend captain Kostas Papanikolaou through 2028.
Joventut Badalona add forward Emir Sulejmanović (via Eurohoops feed).
Hapoel Jerusalem sign Devontae Cacok to a two-year deal.
Turk Telekom re-sign center Emircan Kosut.
Neptunas sign Dutch swingman Yannick Franke.
Heroes Den Bosch extend their partnership with head coach Erik Braal.
Panathinaikos officially sign defensive ace Brancou Badio from Valencia through 2029.
Fenerbahce officially announce the signing of Shavon Shields from Olimpia Milano on a two-year deal, filling the gap left by NBA-bound Tarik Biberovic.
DJ Steward officially signs with Baskonia on a two-year deal after his Trento buyout.
Filou Oostende sign American forward A.J. Clayton.
Luukas Vaara joins Val-Dieu Spirou Basket.
Hapoel Tel Aviv officially sign former Clippers forward Amir Coffey (29) on a one-year deal after seven NBA seasons.
Bahcesehir Koleji sign American forward David DiLeo from Le Mans for the 2026-27 season.
Reyer Venezia add Italian forward Sasha Grant to their roster.
Olympiacos officially part ways with Keenan Evans after two seasons marked by repeated injuries and two major titles together.
Tarik Biberovic officially leaves Fenerbahce; his NBA rights landed with the Dallas Mavericks in the six-team trade.
Jared Butler extends with Crvena Zvezda through 2028 despite multiple offers, staying for new coach Ibon Navarro.
Bayern Munich officially sign center Austin Wiley from Hapoel Jerusalem on a three-year deal.
Krka sign American big man Galin Smith from Neftci Baku.
Lietkabelis and center Gabrielius Maldunas keep working together for two more years (official).
Anwil Wloclawek ink Polish forward Mateusz Szlachetka.
Karditsa land Greek guard Andreas Petropoulos.
Luca Ciurea leaves Dinamo for CSU Sibiu.
Galatasaray MCT Technic officially sign Slovenian point guard Aleksej Nikolic.
Partizan activate the opt-out clause and part ways with Shake Milton.
Landstede Hammers sign Boy van Vliet.
Zorg en Zekerheid Leiden sign Jamie Bergens.
Jonathan Verkerk joins Zeeuw & Zeeuw Rotterdam City Basketball.
Brussels Basketball sign Patrick Tape.
Filou Oostende strengthen their roster with Dakota Leffew.
Olympiacos officially sign EuroLeague Playoffs MVP Jean Montero from Valencia on a three-year deal.
Fenerbahce reportedly agree terms with Cedi Osman to replace NBA-bound Tarik Biberovic (per Sozcu); Osman said to pick Fener over Anadolu Efes.
Panathinaikos officially announce the signing of Guerschon Yabusele on a three-year deal as the French forward leaves the NBA.
Nicolas Batum will reportedly return to France to join ASVEL after 18 NBA seasons (per Backdoor Podcast).
Haris Delalić returns to Igokea m:tel after two seasons as captain of Bosna BH Telecom.
SC Derby sign American forward Andre Wesson.
Fenerbahce announce the signing of guard Trent Forrest on a 2+1 deal.
Anadolu Efes sign Spanish forward Santi Yusta from Casademont Zaragoza on a 1+1 deal.
Maccabi Tel Aviv re-sign captain John DiBartolomeo, extending a partnership running since 2017.
ASVEL secure forward Mbaye Ndiaye on a new three-year deal.
Olimpia Milano strengthen their backcourt with the arrival of guard RJ Cole.
Derthona Tortona sign German forward Karim Jallow (six EuroCup seasons) on a one-year deal.
Krka secure Blaž Mahkovic for the 2026/27 season.
Krka secure Urban Oman for the 2026/27 season.
Bosna BH Telecom appoint Dario Gjergja as new head coach.
UNICS sign 32-year-old Canadian guard Xavier Rathan-Mayes (25.4 ppg at Enisey in 2023/24).
Brussels Basketball bring back Douglas Ntesa.
CB Liège announce the arrival of Blake Bowman.
Maccabi Tel Aviv reportedly in advanced talks to sign Angolan center Bruno Fernando with a lucrative offer on the table.
Alessandro Pajola, leaving Virtus after 11 years, is reportedly one step away from joining Partizan (per Nova.rs).
Perspektiva Ilirija name Slovenian coach Gašper Okorn as new head coach.
Tezenis Verona close to signing CJ Massinburg per LArena; official announcement expected within hours.
Aliaga Petkimspor sign 22-year-old Turkish center Yusuf Gunduz.
Kolossos Rhodes sign Nicolas Benson.
Federico Poser - Tezenis Verona (extended).
Martynas Arlauskas returns to Jonava Hipocredit after a year away.
Kaunas Žalgiris signs Sterling Brown (ex-Partizan) on a 1+1 deal through the 2027-28 season.
Olimpia Milano signs playmaker Darius Thompson on a three-year contract.
Varese signs Australian playmaker William McDowell-White, EuroCup winner with Bourg.
Mykonos Betsson signs American guard Jermaine Love for 2026-27, arriving from Esenler Erokspor.
19-year-old forward Daan Pieters returns to Filou Oostende's regular squad after a loan spell at Okapi Aalst.
UNICS Kazan announces the departure of American playmaker Paris Lee.
Río Breogán signs American playmaker Rasir Bolton (ex-Napoli) for 2026-27.
Casademont Zaragoza signs American wing Caleb Homesley from Bahçeşehir.
LDLC ASVEL announces the return of French forward Yves Pons for 2026-27 (No. 35).
ALBA Berlin signs German guard Julius Böhmer from BG Göttingen on a two-year deal until 2028.
Real Madrid signs Spanish forward Jaime Pradilla from Valencia Basket, reuniting with coach Pedro Martinez.
Cedevita Olimpija signs American point guard Anthony Cowan (28) ahead of 2026/27, arriving from Turkish side Mersin.
Hapoel Tel Aviv extends center Tai Odiase through the 2028-29 season.
Napoli Basketball signs former NBA champion Jack White on a one-year deal.
London Lions sign scoring guard Landrius Horton to a one-year deal.
UNICS Kazan signs Croatian big man Luka Samanic from Zenit on a 1+1 deal.
Hamburg Towers sign French guard Mathys Kangudia from Nantes through at least 2028.
Krka sign experienced American guard Lovell Cabbil Jr. (29).
Nicolò Melli extends his contract with Fenerbahce Beko for two more seasons.
Zenit sign 34-year-old guard Dmitry Kulagin through the 2028/29 season.
Lokomotiv Kuban sign 21-year-old center Gleb Firsov from PARMA on a 3+2 deal.
Andrey Zubkov agrees a contract extension to stay with MBA.
Lokomotiv Kuban sign forward Maksim Barashkov from MBA-MAI through 2027/28.
Uralmash sign 28-year-old forward Igor Volkhin (ex-Zenit, on loan at Avtodor last season).
Uralmash sign Serbian forward Danilo Tasic from Enisey through 2026/27.
UNICS extend guard Alexey Shved for the 2026/27 season.
Uralmash sign 28-year-old American guard Chris Clemons (ex-Houston, played in China, France, Germany).
BETCITY PARMA re-sign 30-year-old American forward BJ Johnson on a one-year deal.
Uralmash sign 30-year-old American guard David Efianyi (last season Petkimspor and Maccabi Tel Aviv).
Uralmash sign 31-year-old guard Mikhail Kulagin (last season Samara then UNICS).
UNICS re-sign 29-year-old American guard CJ Bryce on a one-year deal.
BETCITY PARMA sign 29-year-old center Ilya Karpenkov from Pari NN on a two-year deal.
UNICS appoint Croatian coach Milan Karakaš as head coach (previously assistant there for 5 years).
UNICS part ways with head coach Velimir Perasović, who won them the 2023 VTB League title.
Astana appoint Serbian coach Miodrag Rajković as head coach.
Zenit appoint Dusko Ivanovic as head coach.
Energa Czarni Słupsk sign 25-year-old American big man Demond Robinson (206cm, ex-Murray State/Kennesaw State).
Fenerbahce extend Gabonese center Chris Silva on a 1+1 deal.
Galatasaray MCT Technic sign Turkish national team point guard Sehmus Hazer (27).
Fenerbahce extend American guard Talen Horton-Tucker through the 2026/27 season.
Real Madrid and Alex Len announce a mutual agreement to part ways despite one season left on his contract.
Buducnost VOLI sign forward Justin Smith (2.01m, 27) from Hapoel Jerusalem.
Turk Telekom keep center Kris Bankston for the upcoming season.
Valencia Basket promote long-time assistant Xavi Albert to head coach on a two-year deal, replacing Pedro Martinez.
